name: Licia School Bus
recent_news: No M&A or news found. Listed as an active small Miami school/employee bus operator at 6107 NW 32nd Ave with D&B sales reported around $0.08M; phone (305) 303-9084.
fit_notes: Very small (16 employees, sub-$0.1M reported revenue) Miami micro-operator. Below Summit's typical tuck-in threshold; only relevant as a route/license roll-up in a broader Miami-Dade consolidation play.

name: Slater School Bus Lines Inc
owner_or_parent: Bethel Park School District (likely successor at the address; Slater itself may be defunct)
recent_news: The address 3064 Industrial Blvd, Bethel Park PA 15102 is the Bethel Park School District's own transportation yard (USDOT 1129231, 105 power units, 110 drivers, intrastate passenger-only, MCS-150 updated 10/17/2024). Also listed by directories as 'Park Bethel School Transportation' (412-854-8414, the district's transportation number). Bethel Park SD ratified a 5-year contract with its transportation union in 2015 and approved a new contract in subsequent years, indicating in-house operation, not a private contractor. Pittsburgh-area private contractor for the district is First Student (4780 Library Rd).
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. The 3064 Industrial Blvd location is the Bethel Park School District's in-house transportation depot, unionized and district-operated. 'Slater School Bus Lines Inc' appears to be either a legacy/defunct entity at that address or a stale directory artifact. Excluded from tuck-in universe.

name: Oats Transportation Inc
owner_or_parent: OATS, Inc. (501(c)(3) nonprofit, 'Missouri's Rural Transportation Provider Since 1971')
districts_or_customers: Buchanan County and Northwest Missouri rural general public, seniors, people with disabilities; intercity routes to St. Joseph and Kansas City
recent_news: OATS Transit is a Missouri-wide 501(c)(3) nonprofit operating in 87 counties; 1306 S 58th St, St. Joseph is its Northwest Region office (built/celebrated 2011). Notably, St. Joseph School District itself contracts school bus service to FIRST STUDENT, not to OATS. OATS does not operate school bus routes.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. OATS is a statewide 501(c)(3) nonprofit rural transit provider (not a private school-bus contractor). St. Joseph School District uses First Student. Exclude from Summit acquisition universe.
